steps.title: Identify the core mechanism
steps.content: The notes show that UV light cures the resin layer by layer (through the dead zone mechanism), then oven baking completes the cure.

steps.title: Find the answer that directly expresses this mechanism
steps.content:
C does—it shows UV light projected into the resin pool curing a 3D object layer by layer, then oven baking completing the cure.

The others either misidentify what the dead zone does, misstate when curing completes, or bury the mechanism in awkward phrasing and extraneous detail.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
